title: Failure when building Yosys
body:
Version: Yosys 0.52+63 (git sha1 088240c03, clang++ 18.1.3 -fPIC -O3)

When updating the Yosys version in OpenROAD-flow-scripts, we had a build error in our public CI. It seems related to abc/cadical:

```
[...]
[ 94%] ABC: `` Compiling: /src/sat/cadical/cadical_version.cpp
[ 94%] ABC: `` Compiling: /src/sat/cadical/cadical_vivify.cpp
src/sat/cadical/cadical_version.cpp:108:30: error: expected ';' after return statement
const char *date () { return DATE; }
                             ^
src/sat/cadical/cadical_version.cpp:90:23: note: expanded from macro 'DATE'
#define DATE __DATE__ " " __TIME__
                      ^
1 error generated.
[...]
```

I guess it is related to the macro `DATE`. It's possible that this name is defined somewhere else by the CI system, leading to the build error:
```
// Build Time and operating system.
//
#ifndef DATE
#define DATE __DATE__ " " __TIME__
#endif
```
code_blocks:
[...]
[ 94%] ABC: `` Compiling: /src/sat/cadical/cadical_version.cpp
[ 94%] ABC: `` Compiling: /src/sat/cadical/cadical_vivify.cpp
src/sat/cadical/cadical_version.cpp:108:30: error: expected ';' after return statement
const char *date () { return DATE; }
                             ^
src/sat/cadical/cadical_version.cpp:90:23: note: expanded from macro 'DATE'
#define DATE __DATE__ " " __TIME__
                      ^
1 error generated.
[...]
